violations.text: Cold water at handwashing sinks in restrooms are not dispensing water. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
Hot water at handwashing sink in women restroom observed with a low water pressure. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
Toilets and urinals in restrooms was inoperable at the time of inspection. Plumber on site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024

The outside dumpster area was observed with litter, trash, foliage, and other debris. The outside refuse area shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean and kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
The floors in the walk in coolers observed with food product. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
